mapper.select: SELECT perm.id, perm.user_id, usr.username, usr.real_name, perm.base_id, kb.base_name, perm.can_view, perm.can_upload, perm.can_train_skill, perm.can_analyze, perm.status, perm.grant_time FROM ai_user_knowledge_permission perm INNER JOIN sys_user usr ON usr.id = perm.user_id AND usr.is_deleted = FALSE INNER JOIN ai_knowledge_base kb ON kb.id = perm.base_id AND kb.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE perm.user_id = #{userId} AND perm.status = 1 ORDER BY perm.grant_time DESC, perm.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_user_knowledge_permission SET can_view = #{canView}, can_upload = #{canUpload}, can_train_skill = #{canTrainSkill}, can_analyze = #{canAnalyze}, status = #{status}, grant_time = #{grantTime}, grant_user = #{grantUser} WHERE id = #{id}
